title: BAM manifest schema
description: Input manifest linking cell IDs to per-cell BAM files

cell_id.description: Unique cell identifier — must match cell_id in cell_metadata and MEDICC2 tree leaves

bam_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the cell BAM file

bai_path.description: Path to the BAM index (.bai). Inferred from bam_path if empty.

sample_id.description: Sample identifier (tumour sample the cell belongs to)

patient_id.description: Patient / donor identifier (used to join with matched normal)
